# Tuungane

> Tuungane is a Uganda-based services marketplace that connects customers with trusted, skilled service providers across home repair, cleaning, beauty, automotive, tutoring, and more.

Customers post a request describing what they need; nearby skilled providers respond. Providers list their skills and businesses to be discovered locally.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Find services or list your skill
- [About](/about): Mission and how Tuungane works
- [Services](/services): Browse all service categories
- [Browse requests](/requests/browse): Open service requests from customers
- [Businesses](/businesses): Directory of local businesses
- [Opportunities](/opportunities): Jobs and gigs board
- [Official posts](/official): Updates from verified accounts
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the Tuungane team

## Guides

- [Property maintenance in Kampala](/guides/property-maintenance-kampala): How to hire trusted maintenance pros

## Optional

- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service
